response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage focus. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang. No cloud compute platform experience, no formal tech-lead role, and no production cloud architecture work is evident.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Demonstrated mentoring and knowledge-sharing through workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments
No demonstrated cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
